title: The Real Lesson of Elon Musk’s Outrage at Christopher Nolan
description: Right-wing anger aboutThe Odysseysays more about today’s myopic understanding of identity than it does about classical antiquity.

description: Even as AI progresses, coders aren’t doomed.

title: Barney Frank Was Like No One Else
description: He was the smartest man in the room, a rare attribute for a member of modern-day Congress

description: I’m not talking about keg stands. I’m talking about the joyous mysteries of intellectual life.

description: Could the current partisan redistricting frenzy lead to reform?

description: The idea that Israel and the United States might back Mahmoud Ahmadinejad in a coup has drawn guffaws from several different groups.

title: How Trump’s Culture War Derailed a New Smithsonian Museum
description: Republicans wanted to narrow the scope of the Women’s History Museum and give the president power over its location. The attempt failed.

title: Photos of the Week: Chief Mouser, Pet Gala, Soapbox Race
